message:
refactor(ui): remove estimated token count from result row analytics and stats bar

The chars/4 token heuristic produced misleading numbers that varied
wildly depending on snippet vs full-content availability and did not
reflect actual API token usage. Remove the feature entirely:

- Remove estimated_tokens field from RowMiniAnalytics
- Remove estimate_tokens_from_hit_for_stats() helper
- Simplify render_mini_analytics_spans() to show only matched message
  counts at all breakpoints (previously MediumNarrow showed tokens only,
  Medium/Wide showed tokens + messages)
- Remove token accumulation from build_results_stats_line() and
  compute_session_mini_analytics()
- Update tests to reflect removal: rename tests, remove token assertions,
  add negative assertions confirming tokens are no longer displayed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
